reason_for_decision: The article passes as a beginner guide because it makes detection range conditional on target, environment, probability, and workflow rather than treating it as one universal number.
strengths: The article is strong on explaining why published range numbers are conditional rather than absolute.
It clearly separates detection range from tracking and identification range, which improves conceptual accuracy.
The sections on probability, false alarms, and geometry prevent a simplistic reading of range claims.
summary_assessment: This is a solid pass for a foundation article. It gives readers an accurate and useful mental model for interpreting detection range claims honestly.
